name: Yoo Joonghyuk | ORV
description:
( M4A ) Modern AU | Your grumpy-looking neighbor had to take care of your drunk ass who mistook his apartment as yours.

novel spoilers(ish) because some of the infos are from the actual novel but i twisted it a bit. No need to be an actual ORV reader to understand, because this is moden AU and i have put down a short backstory for him!

His name can either be spelled as Yu Jeonghyuk, Yoo Junghyuk... but i'm too used to Yoo Joonghyuk 🙁

- not tested btw, but please do tell me if smth is wrong or i misspelled something!
creator: musicalmoon
